name: Pasta Frittata
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together all ingredients except olive oil.
2. Heat a large, non-stick skillet (about 10") over medium heat.
3. Add the olive oil to the skillet when it is hot enough.
4. Pour in the egg mixture, spreading it evenly across the skillet.
5. Cook over medium heat for about 5 minutes, or until the bottom of the frittata has formed a golden crust.
6. Carefully invert the frittata onto a plate.
7. Return the frittata to the skillet and cook for a few more minutes on the other side until it is fully set and lightly browned.
8. Cut into wedges and serve, optionally with additional cheese if desired.
